requirement_topic.en: Market Access, Importer Duties & No Single Approval Mark
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入、进口商义务及无单一批准标志
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入、進口商義務及無單一批准標誌

summary.en: Canada's toy market access is based on compliance with the CCPSA and its regulations, not a pre-market CE-style approval mark. The CCPSA prohibits manufacturing, importing, advertising, or selling consumer products that are a danger to human health or safety, requires records for traceability, and imposes mandatory incident reporting and recall-related obligations on regulated parties.
summary.zh: 加拿大玩具市场准入以符合CCPSA及其法规为基础，而不是上市前CE式批准标志。CCPSA禁止制造、进口、广告或销售对人体健康或安全构成危险的消费品，要求保存可追溯记录，并对受监管主体施加强制事故报告和召回相关义务。
summary.zht: 加拿大玩具市場准入以符合CCPSA及其法規為基礎，而不是上市前CE式批准標誌。CCPSA禁止製造、進口、廣告或銷售對人體健康或安全構成危險的消費品，要求保存可追溯記錄，並對受監管主體施加強制事故報告和召回相關義務。

standards_or_laws: Canada Consumer Product Safety Act (S.C. 2010, c. 21), prohibitions, document retention, incident reporting, orders, and recalls

summary.en: China commonly uses CCC as a mandatory third-party certification route for covered toy categories sold domestically. CCC involves designated certification bodies, type testing, factory inspection, and a certification mark. That model is materially different from Canada's post-market enforcement system under the CCPSA.
summary.zh: 中国对国内销售的覆盖玩具类别通常采用CCC强制第三方认证路径。CCC包括指定认证机构、型式试验、工厂检查和认证标志。该模式与加拿大CCPSA项下的上市后执法体系存在实质差异。
summary.zht: 中國對國內銷售的覆蓋玩具類別通常採用CCC強制第三方認證路徑。CCC包括指定認證機構、型式試驗、工廠檢查和認證標誌。該模式與加拿大CCPSA項下的上市後執法體系存在實質差異。

standards_or_laws: China Compulsory Certification (CCC) toy certification scheme
GB 6675 series — National toy safety standards

gap.en: Chinese exporters should not look for a Canadian CE equivalent. Instead, assign a Canadian importer of record, maintain test reports and supplier records, prepare CCPSA incident-report workflows, and verify all applicable regulations before first shipment. A CCC mark can remain if truthful and not misleading, but it is not evidence of Canadian approval and cannot replace Canadian compliance files.
gap.zh: 中国出口商不应寻找加拿大CE等同标志，而应确定加拿大进口商、保存测试报告和供应商记录、建立CCPSA事故报告流程，并在首次出货前核验所有适用法规。CCC标志在真实且不误导的情况下可以保留，但它不是加拿大批准证据，也不能替代加拿大合规文件。
gap.zht: 中國出口商不應尋找加拿大CE等同標誌，而應確定加拿大進口商、保存測試報告和供應商記錄、建立CCPSA事故報告流程，並在首次出貨前核驗所有適用法規。CCC標誌在真實且不誤導的情況下可以保留，但它不是加拿大批准證據，也不能替代加拿大合規文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CCPSA compliance, records, incident reporting, and regulatory conformity are legal obligations; no single toy approval mark is required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification mark required for covered toy categories sold in mainland China

source.publisher: Justice Laws Website / Government of Canada

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Canada is not a mark-first toy regime. Market entry depends on documented compliance with CCPSA rules and readiness for Health Canada enforcement, incident reporting, and recalls; CCC does not transfer into Canadian approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 加拿大并非以标志为核心的玩具制度。市场准入取决于有文件证明符合CCPSA规则，并能够应对加拿大卫生部执法、事故报告和召回；CCC不能转化为加拿大批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 加拿大並非以標誌為核心的玩具制度。市場准入取決於有文件證明符合CCPSA規則，並能夠應對加拿大衛生部執法、事故報告和召回；CCC不能轉化為加拿大批准。
